prompt: A minimalist 3D studio product render of an open laptop resting on top of a modular matte-black industrial cube pedestal, centered slightly left against a clean pale lavender background with a soft purple glow blooming from the lower left. The laptop is shown at a three-quarter angle facing right, with a thin black bezel and slim dark chassis, opened roughly 100 degrees. On the screen, display a minimalist web design portfolio homepage for Teoroa, with a white interface and wide horizontal lavender gradient bands across the hero area. In the top left is a small abstract bird-like logo followed by the brand name, and across the top navigation are exactly 4 menu items: Home, Works, Studio, News, plus a separate Contact link at the far right. In the hero section, place the headline Designing intelligent visual systems with advanced artificial intelligence for modern digital experiences. in clean modern sans-serif black type on the upper right, with a tiny link beneath reading Let's Connect →. Along the lower visible portion of the screen, show oversized cropped black typography reading Teoroo Studio™. The pedestal beneath the laptop is a stack of modular speaker-like metal cubes with perforations, circular ports, screws, recessed panels, and grille textures; the front center section is partially transparent glossy black, revealing internal mechanical details including 2 coiled spring elements, 3 lavender circular connector accents, and 2 small dangling cable-like hooks. Add subtle reflections, realistic studio lighting, soft shadows, and a premium futuristic industrial design aesthetic. Composition is sparse and elegant, with lots of negative space, high contrast between the black object and pastel background, and a polished art-directed tech campaign feel.
